title: MSN 1874 (M+F) Amendment 11 Marine Equipment United Kingdom conformity assessment and type approval procedures for marine equipment
body: "Further context, include target audience information from beginning notice:    Notice to all Manufacturers and Distributors of Marine Equipment, Masters, Officers and Skippers of: Merchant Ships, Fishing Vessels, Small Commercial Vessels and Pleasures Vessels,   This Merchant Shipping Notice replaces MSN 1874 (M+F) amendment 10.    This Note should be read in conjunction with the Merchant Shipping (Marine Equipment) Regulations 2025. "
